props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Defines how the text will be translated for the screen reader. If not specified it will fall back to the name.

props.name: autoComplete
props.description: Specifies the autocomplete attribute for the textarea input.

props.name: countBy
props.description: Counting interval for characters or words, specifying whether to count every character or word.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Sets the input to a disabled state.

props.name: error
props.description: Sets the input to an error state.

props.name: id
props.description: Sets the id attribute on the textarea element.

props.name: maxCount
props.description: Maximum number of characters or words allowed.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Sets the maximum width of the text area.

props.name: name
props.description: Name of the input value that is received in the change event.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Text displayed within the textarea when no value is set.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Sets the input to a read only state.

props.name: rows
props.description: Sets the number of visible text rows.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the visual size variant of the text area.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: value
props.description: Bound to the current value of the textarea.

props.name: width
props.description: Sets the width of the text area.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Callback fired when the textarea loses focus.

events.name: onChange
events.description: Callback fired when the value of the textarea changes.

events.name: onKeyPress
events.description: Callback fired when a key is pressed within the textarea.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Defines how the text will be translated for the screen reader. If not specified it will fall back to the name.

props.name: autoComplete
props.description: Specifies the autocomplete attribute for the textarea input.

props.name: countBy
props.description: Counting interval for characters or words, specifying whether to count every character or word.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Sets the disabled state for the control.

props.name: error
props.description: Sets the error state for the control.

props.name: id
props.description: Sets the id attribute of the underlying web component.

props.name: maxCount
props.description: Maximum number of characters or words allowed.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Maximum width of the text area.

props.name: mb
props.description: Sets the bottom margin spacing token.

props.name: ml
props.description: Sets the left margin spacing token.

props.name: mr
props.description: Sets the right margin spacing token.

props.name: mt
props.description: Sets the top margin spacing token.

props.name: name
props.description: Name of the input value that is received in the _change event.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Text displayed within the input when no value is set.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Sets the input to a read only state.

props.name: rows
props.description: Set the number of rows.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the size variant of the textarea.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets the data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: value
props.description: Sets the control value used by Angular forms and one-way binding.

props.name: width
props.description: Width of the text area.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Emits when the textarea loses focus. Emits the name and current value.

events.name: onChange
events.description: Emits when the textarea value changes. Emits the name and new value.

events.name: onKeyPress
events.description: Emits when a key is pressed in the textarea. Emits the name, value, and key.
